Established 1998 · Sowcarpet, Chennai

Trusted medical supplies for homes, hospitals and institutions.

Authorised Brands We Carry

1998Established
About Us

Serving care since 1998

Started from a single shop in Sowcarpet, Chennai Surgical has spent 28+ years earning the trust of hospitals, families, schools and institutions across India. We stock 3,000+ products covering everything from patient care at home to fully equipped hospital wards.

We believe quality healthcare should be accessible to everyone. That is why we bring retail convenience with wholesale pricing, so cost is never a reason someone goes without the care they need.

Our MottoQuality care within reach.
Our VisionTo be the supplier every hospital, family and institution calls first, because the answer is always yes.
Why Chennai Surgical

What 28+ years of doing this looks like

Since 1998

Most of our business is repeat customers and referrals. A hospital admin who bought from us in 2005 still does today.

Quality You Can Trust

We stock Omron, Tynor, Romsons, Accu-Chek, Friends, BD, Dispovan, Ramraju, Surgicot and other verified brands.

Enquiry Cart

Add multiple products to your enquiry cart and send one WhatsApp message for all of them. No need to message separately for each item.

GST Invoicing

Proper invoicing for hospitals, institutions and businesses. We support procurement with full documentation.

Pan-India Delivery

We ship to hospitals, homes and schools across every state in India.

Walk In Welcome

Nyniappa Naicken Street, Sowcarpet, Chennai. Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM.

Get in touch

Contact Chennai Surgical

Store Address112, Nyniappa Naicken Street, Sowcarpet, Park Town, Chennai 600 003, Tamil Nadu
Mobile & WhatsApp+91 93821 31902
Landline044-4205 3522
Store HoursMonday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM
Get Directions

Send an Enquiry

Received. We will reply within a few hours.

Home › Schools & Colleges › Schools
Schools

School Lab Equipment

We supply complete lab setups for school science labs across Tamil Nadu. Send us your requirement list and we will put a package together.

Chemistry Lab

Beakers • Conical Flasks • Measuring Cylinders • Separating Funnels • Round and Flat Bottom Flasks • Petri Dishes • Burettes • Test Tubes • Pipettes • Retort Stands • Bunsen Burners • Tripod Stands • Wire Gauze

Physics Lab

Vernier Caliper • Screw Gauge • Spring Balance • Lab Thermometer • Lactometer • Concave and Convex Lenses • Magnets • Prism • Pulley • Weights (gram set)

Biology Lab

Compound Microscope • Microscope Slides and Cover Slips • Dissection Kit • Specimen Jars and Specimens • Petri Dishes • Staining Solutions

Need a full lab setup?

Send us your school requirement list or the number of students and we will put together a complete package with pricing.

Home › Ready-Made Kits
Ready-Made Kits

Everything you need, pre-assembled.

One enquiry, one order, everything sorted. Kits for ICU at home, PD patients, home dressing and new clinic setup.

ICU Setup at Home

For: Families caring for a bedridden or critically ill patient at home
Hospital CotCot MattressPillowSuction MachineNebulizerAir BedSuction CatheterOxygen CylinderAdult DiapersUnderpadsWipesFood TrolleyExamination GlovesCottonDigital ThermometerThermovent HME FilterHand Sanitizer

This kit can be customised. Some items like oxygen cylinder may need a prescription.

PD Patient Care Kit

For: Patients on Peritoneal Dialysis at home
SS Sterile BinBP MachinePD Weighing ScaleIV StandMicropore TapeSterile GauzeNon-Sterile GauzeDressing KitPovidone Iodine SolutionHand SanitizerT-Bact Ointment

All items selected for PD wound care and daily monitoring.

Home Dressing Kit

For: Families managing wound care at home after surgery or injury
Roller BandageHydrogen PeroxidePovidone Iodine OintmentNormal SalineSterile GauzeNon-Sterile GauzeCottonMicropore TapeDressing PadOpty GauzeBactigrasSoft RollJellonet

Tell us the wound type and we will suggest the right items.

New Clinic Setup Package

For: Doctors opening a new clinic or consultation room
Examination TableDoctor Chair and TablePatient Cot and MattressIV StandFoot StoolRevolving StoolArtery Forceps, Needle Holder, Suture RemoverSpirit, Cotton, BandageThermometerBP MachineStethoscopeSyringesNebulizerSanitizerBio Dustbin and BagsExamination GlovesKidney TraySterilizerDressing Drum BinIV Set (Infusion Set)SV SetIV CannulaFace MasksDisposable Bedsheets

We have set up dozens of clinics across Chennai. WhatsApp your specialty and room size.

Need a custom kit?

Tell us the patient situation or clinical setup and we will put together a custom list with pricing.

Home › About Us
About Chennai Surgical

28+ years of trusted medical supply

Established 1998, Sowcarpet, Chennai

1998Established

Our Journey

Started from a single shop in Sowcarpet, Chennai Surgical has spent 28+ years earning the trust of hospitals, families, schools and institutions across India. We stock 3,000+ products covering everything from patient care at home to fully equipped hospital wards.

We believe quality healthcare should be accessible to everyone. That is why we bring retail convenience with wholesale pricing, so cost is never a reason someone goes without the care they need.

Our Motto Quality care within reach.
Our Vision The supplier every family and hospital calls first.
1998 Year established
3,000+ Products in range
All India Delivery network

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions about Chennai Surgical

Answers to the most common questions from our customers, hospitals and institutions. Not answered here? WhatsApp us on 93821 31902.

Chennai Surgical stocks standard folding wheelchairs, commode wheelchairs, motorised wheelchairs and wheelchairs with attendant brake. Home delivery available anywhere in India. Call 93821 31902 or WhatsApp.
We stock adult diapers in S, M, L, XL from Friends, Doctor C, Realcare and Econap. Both stick type and pant type available. Home delivery across Chennai and all over India. Call 93821 31902.
Chennai Surgical stocks Omron, Dr. Morepen, Genesis and Diamond blood pressure monitors including manual, digital upper arm, wrist type and mercury type. Available in store and with home delivery. Call 93821 31902.
We supply patient cots including semi fowler and folder type, ICU beds, examination tables, stretchers, IV stands and dressing trolleys to hospitals across India. GST invoicing available. Call 93821 31902.
Yes. Chennai Surgical delivers to hospitals, homes and schools in every state across India. WhatsApp 93821 31902 with your requirement and we will arrange delivery.
We stock Romsons IV sets, foley catheters, urine bags, suction catheters, cee-tee catheters, K-catheters and scalp vein sets. Call 93821 31902.
We are authorised dealers for Tynor and stock the complete Tynor range including knee support, lumbar belt, cervical collar, wrist splint, ankle brace, abdominal belt, compression stockings and arm sling.
Yes, Chennai Surgical is an authorised Tynor dealer and carries the complete Tynor orthopaedic support range.
Yes. We supply scrub suits, community nursing bags, suturing practice pads, anatomy models and nursing kits for nursing colleges. We also supply complete chemistry, physics and biology lab setups for schools and medical colleges. WhatsApp 93821 31902.
Yes. All hospital and institutional orders come with proper GST invoicing. We support procurement departments with full documentation.
The ICU setup at home kit from Chennai Surgical includes a hospital cot, mattress, pillow, suction machine, nebulizer, air bed, suction catheter, oxygen cylinder, adult diapers, underpads, wipes, food trolley, examination gloves, cotton, digital thermometer, thermovent HME filter and hand sanitizer. The kit can be customised based on the patient situation.
Yes, Ramraju and Surgicot are among the major brands we carry for dressing materials. We stock sterile gauze, opty gauze, soft roll, roller bandage, dressing pads and gamjee pads from these brands.

Didn't find your answer?

WhatsApp us directly and we will reply within a few hours.
